Class ReplaceOperation

java.lang.Object
com.linecorp.centraldogma.common.jsonpatch.JsonPatchOperation
com.linecorp.centraldogma.common.jsonpatch.ReplaceOperation
All Implemented Interfaces:
JsonSerializable
public final class ReplaceOperation extends JsonPatchOperation
JSON Patch replace operation.

For this operation, path points to the value to replace, and value is the replacement value.

It is an error condition if path does not point to an actual JSON value.
